hooks.command: if [ "${CREW_NOTIFY:-0}" != "1" ]; then exit 0; fi; if command -v cmux >/dev/null 2>&1 || [ -x /Applications/cmux.app/Contents/Resources/bin/cmux ]; then PATH="/Applications/cmux.app/Contents/Resources/bin:$PATH" cmux claude-hook notification 2>/dev/null || true; fi

if [ "${CREW_NOTIFY:-0}" != "1" ]; then exit 0; fi; if command -v cmux >/dev/null 2>&1 || [ -x /Applications/cmux.app/Contents/Resources/bin/cmux ]; then PATH="/Applications/cmux.app/Contents/Resources/bin:$PATH" cmux claude-hook stop 2>/dev/null || true; fi
